findings.title: Investigate Search Relevance Drop
findings.description: Conduct a root-cause analysis to identify the factors contributing to the 15% drop in search relevance scores for anonymous users following the v2.4.1 deployment.
assumptions: The new ranking algorithm is the primary cause of the relevance drop.

evidence.excerpt: Search relevance score dropped 15% after deploy v2.4.1

recommendations: Perform a detailed analysis of the ranking algorithm.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the search relevance score data WHEN the analysis is complete THEN a report detailing the findings and recommendations is produced.
metadata.story_title: Conduct Root-Cause Analysis for Relevance Drop

findings.title: Optimize Mobile Search Latency
findings.description: Profile the search latency on mobile and optimize the ranking model or implement mobile-specific caching to reduce the P95 latency from 890ms to below 600ms.
assumptions: The new ranking model is causing increased latency.

evidence.excerpt: Search latency increased on mobile web

recommendations: Implement caching strategies for mobile search.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the mobile search latency data WHEN optimizations are applied THEN the P95 latency is reduced to below 600ms.

findings.title: Fix Autocomplete Cache Configuration
findings.description: Adjust the cache TTL for autocomplete suggestions from 7 days back to 24 hours to ensure users receive relevant and timely suggestions.
assumptions: The stale suggestions are due to an incorrect cache configuration.

evidence.excerpt: Search autocomplete suggestions showing stale data

recommendations: Reconfigure the cache settings for autocomplete.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the autocomplete cache settings WHEN the TTL is adjusted THEN suggestions are updated every 24 hours.

findings.title: Implement Instrumentation for New Search Features
findings.description: Add analytics instrumentation for image search and voice search to track user interactions and performance metrics.
assumptions: Instrumentation is necessary to measure the success of new features.

evidence.excerpt: Missing search analytics events for new query types

recommendations: Implement tracking for image and voice search events.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new search features WHEN instrumentation is implemented THEN analytics events for image and voice search are recorded.
metadata.story_title: Implement Instrumentation for New Search Features

findings.title: Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search
findings.description: Define and implement baseline metrics for image search, including query volume, zero-result rate, and click-through rate to measure its effectiveness.
assumptions: Baseline metrics are essential for measuring success.

evidence.excerpt: Need baseline metrics for image search

recommendations: Set up tracking for image search metrics.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the image search feature WHEN baseline metrics are established THEN metrics for query volume, zero-result rate, and click-through rate are available.
metadata.story_title: Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search

findings.title: Conduct A/B Testing for Ranking Algorithm
findings.description: Design and execute a new A/B test specifically targeting anonymous users to evaluate the impact of the ranking algorithm on their search relevance.
assumptions: A/B testing is necessary to validate changes.

evidence.excerpt: A/B test for new ranking algorithm inconclusive

recommendations: Run a targeted A/B test for anonymous users.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new A/B test is designed WHEN it is executed THEN results for anonymous users are collected and analyzed.
metadata.story_title: Conduct A/B Testing for Ranking Algorithm

findings.title: Monitor Search Relevance Metrics
findings.description: Implement monitoring and alerting for search relevance scores to proactively identify and address drops in performance.
assumptions: Monitoring is essential for maintaining search quality.

evidence.excerpt: North Star Metric: Search Relevance Score

recommendations: Set up alerts for significant drops in relevance scores.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is implemented WHEN relevance scores drop significantly THEN alerts are triggered.

findings.title: Collect User Feedback on Search Experience
findings.description: Implement a mechanism to collect user feedback specifically from anonymous users regarding their search experience to inform future improvements.
assumptions: User feedback is crucial for understanding user needs.

evidence.excerpt: Search relevance score dropped 15% after deploy v2.4.1

recommendations: Create a feedback form for anonymous users.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is implemented WHEN anonymous users provide feedback THEN their responses are collected and analyzed.
metadata.story_title: Collect User Feedback on Search Experience

findings.title: Enhance Search Analytics Dashboard
findings.description: Update the search analytics dashboard to include metrics for new features like image and voice search, providing visibility into their performance.
assumptions: Analytics dashboards need to reflect current features.

evidence.excerpt: Missing search analytics events for new query types

recommendations: Revise the analytics dashboard to include new metrics.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard is updated WHEN new features are added THEN their metrics are displayed correctly.

findings.title: Implement Error Handling for Search Queries
findings.description: Develop robust error handling for search queries to ensure users receive meaningful feedback when queries fail or return zero results.
assumptions: Users need clear feedback on search failures.

evidence.excerpt: Search autocomplete suggestions showing stale data

recommendations: Create user-friendly error messages for search failures.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a search query fails WHEN the error handling is triggered THEN a user-friendly error message is displayed.
metadata.story_title: Implement Error Handling for Search Queries

findings.title: Review and Update Search Documentation
findings.description: Revise the search documentation to reflect changes made in the v2.4.1 deployment and provide guidance on new features and metrics.
assumptions: Documentation must be current and accurate.
recommendations: Update documentation to include new features and changes.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the documentation is updated WHEN new features are added THEN the documentation accurately reflects those changes.

summary: The analysis of the recent deployment of the SearchBoost Query Engine has identified critical issues affecting search relevance and performance. A structured backlog of requirements has been created to address these issues, including root-cause analysis, performance optimizations, instrumentation for new features, and user feedback collection. Each requirement is prioritized and categorized for effective implementation.
